{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = Naraka waystation obelisk
| introduced = tg-03-city-of-light
}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Naraka waystation]] features a fifteen-foot-tall obelisk of black stone marked with twisting golden runes.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c9">''City of Light'', chapter 9</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
